frontend/src/App.tsx.reason: Main app component with 4 page sections (candidates, stock detail, operations, settings). Partially extracted — utils and chart components moved out. Page-level extraction planned.

frontend/src/styles.css.reason: Global CSS: variables, layout, component styles, Ant Design overrides, responsive breakpoints. Cascade-dependent.

src/ashare_evidence/analysis_pipeline.py.reason: Analysis pipeline stages with tight coupling between steps. Cohesive pipeline definition.

src/ashare_evidence/api.py.reason: FastAPI application with 4 route groups (dashboard, simulation, settings, manual-research). Router extraction planned.

src/ashare_evidence/cli.py.reason: CLI command group: data refresh, cache management, admin operations.

src/ashare_evidence/dashboard.py.reason: Dashboard data aggregation and view building. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/intraday_market.py.reason: Intraday market data: fetching, caching, status tracking. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/manual_research_work.reason: Manual research workflow: request creation, execution, completion, retry. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/models.py.reason: SQLAlchemy ORM models: Stock, Recommendation, PaperOrder, PaperPortfolio. Naturally cohesive.

src/ashare_evidence/operations.py.reason: Operations dashboard builder with tightly coupled payload functions, order checks, and shared module-level constants (MODE_LABELS, PositionState). Extraction attempted 2026-04-28 — dependency cascade risk.

src/ashare_evidence/phase2/holding_polic.reason: Phase 2 holding policy experiment runner: sweep execution, result collection. Cohesive experiment.
Phase 2 holding policy study definition: parameters, backtest config, analysis. Cohesive study.

src/ashare_evidence/release_verifier.py.reason: Release verification: build check, health check, parity verification. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/runtime_config.py.reason: Runtime configuration management: settings resolution, defaults, validation. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/schemas.py.reason: 60+ Pydantic models with cross-references. Domain split planned (similar to TypeScript types.ts barrel pattern).

src/ashare_evidence/services.py.reason: Multiple service classes: data provider service, signal service, portfolio service, analysis service. Domain split planned.

src/ashare_evidence/signal_engine_parts/.reason: Recommendation signal engine: scoring, ranking, direction inference. Cohesive engine component.

src/ashare_evidence/simulation.py.reason: Simulation engine: position sizing, performance metrics, scenario config, order execution. Highly cohesive domain logic.
